body_html:
Come visit 

Sent from my iPhone

On May 23, 2008, at 4:13 AM, Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com> wrote:

Hi Froshy... how are you? I just got back from spain..nothing special.. :)
I've got the job at Deutsche bank (PWM) but haven't signed the contract yet..
I'm happy about it...
 
What is new?
 
misssss you much


"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> пишет:
have you applied ot jp morgan"?   i  miss you

----- Original Message ----
From: Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, January 22, 2008 7:03:47 AM
Subject: hi

hi Jeffrey,
how are you?
 
Did you get any information about JPMorgan in Moscow? Is it possible for me to get in?
 
I made a little reseach and found out that Natalia Tsukanova is a Vice president at JP Morgan Moscow office...
 
Thanks
 

"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> пишет:
yes

From: Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>

Sent: Sunday, January 13, 2008 8:49:52 AM

call me 212 750 9895

when do you have time?

----- Original Message ----
From: Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, October 15, 2007 4:30:54 AM
Subject: Ответ: Re: ╬БруБ: Re:

Hi Jeffrey,
How are you? it seems that you have been very busy lately....
 
I just got back from Germany..i was doing an internship at Dresdner bank (investment banking) in Munich for 3 months, it was a very good experience for me ....and now Im trying to find a job here in Moscow in finance field as well.....i was wondering if you have any contacts with finance companies here in Moscow that could help me to get a job?
thanks so much....
I hope you are well Froshy :)
Ekaterina Mitr
